scripts.build:release:zh-CN: tauri build --no-bundle --config src-tauri/tauri.zh-CN.conf.json && node tools/finalize-release-binary.mjs zh-CN
scripts.build:release:en-US: tauri build --no-bundle --config src-tauri/tauri.en-US.conf.json && node tools/finalize-release-binary.mjs en-US
scripts.build:nsis:zh-CN: tauri build --bundles nsis --no-sign --config src-tauri/tauri.zh-CN.conf.json && node tools/finalize-release-binary.mjs zh-CN && node tools/rename-nsis-artifact.mjs zh-CN
scripts.build:nsis:en-US: tauri build --bundles nsis --no-sign --config src-tauri/tauri.en-US.conf.json && node tools/finalize-release-binary.mjs en-US && node tools/rename-nsis-artifact.mjs en-US
scripts.build:nsis:ci:zh-CN: tauri build --bundles nsis --config src-tauri/tauri.zh-CN.conf.json && node tools/finalize-release-binary.mjs zh-CN && node tools/rename-nsis-artifact.mjs zh-CN
scripts.build:nsis:ci:en-US: tauri build --bundles nsis --config src-tauri/tauri.en-US.conf.json && node tools/finalize-release-binary.mjs en-US && node tools/rename-nsis-artifact.mjs en-US
